title: Marketplace → Product → Procurement
description: Every screen of buying: browse the catalogue, open a product, build a procurement list, then raise an RFQ.

steps.title: Product categories
steps.voiceScript: Equipment is grouped by category, each card showing its supplier price.
steps.captionText: Equipment is grouped by category, each card showing its supplier price.
steps.fallbackMessage: Product categories: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Filter by country
steps.description: Compliance badges follow the selected market.
steps.voiceScript: Pick your country to see which products are compliant for your market.
steps.captionText: Pick your country to see which products are compliant for your market.
steps.fallbackMessage: Filter by country: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Search
steps.description: Search narrows the catalogue as you type.
steps.voiceScript: Search for the item you need, for example an LV cable.
steps.captionText: Search for the item you need, for example an LV cable.
steps.fallbackMessage: Search: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open a product
steps.description: The product screen carries the full specification.
steps.voiceScript: Let us open a product to see its full specification.
steps.captionText: Let us open a product to see its full specification.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open a product: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Specification
steps.description: Voltage, size, standard and datasheet link.
steps.voiceScript: This is the product specification, with a link to the manufacturer datasheet.
steps.captionText: This is the product specification, with a link to the manufacturer datasheet.
steps.fallbackMessage: Specification: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add to BOQ
steps.description: Selected products flow into your BOM and BOQ.
steps.voiceScript: Adding the product puts it into your bill of quantities.
steps.captionText: Adding the product puts it into your bill of quantities.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add to BOQ: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Procurement Center
steps.description: Where the buying list is assembled.
steps.voiceScript: Now we move to the Procurement Center to assemble the buying list.
steps.captionText: Now we move to the Procurement Center to assemble the buying list.
steps.fallbackMessage: Procurement Center: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Tick what you need
steps.description: The checkbox grid is grouped by category.
steps.voiceScript: Tick every product you intend to buy.
steps.captionText: Tick every product you intend to buy.
steps.fallbackMessage: Tick what you need: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Generate the price sheet
steps.description: Ten columns including supplier contact details.
steps.voiceScript: Generate the price sheet: supplier names, phones and addresses included.
steps.captionText: Generate the price sheet: supplier names, phones and addresses included.
steps.fallbackMessage: Generate the price sheet: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Raise an RFQ
steps.description: Ask suppliers to quote against the list.
steps.voiceScript: Finally, raise a request for quotation so suppliers can bid.
steps.captionText: Finally, raise a request for quotation so suppliers can bid.
steps.fallbackMessage: Raise an RFQ: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Your RFQs
steps.description: Track every quotation request and compare responses.
steps.voiceScript: Every quotation request is tracked here so you can compare the responses.
steps.captionText: Every quotation request is tracked here so you can compare the responses.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your RFQs: not visible on this screen yet.
